name: ASTM S.p.A.
summary: ASTM S.p.A., an industrial holding company, operates in the sectors of motorway management, infrastructure engineering and construction projects, and transport and mobility technology. The company operates through five segments: Motorway Sector (Operating Activities), Motorway/EPC Sector Planning and Construction Activities-IFRIC 12, EPC Sector, Technology Sector, Services Sector. As of June 30, 2020, the company managed a motorway network of approximately 4,594 km, which included 1,423 km network in Italy, as well as 3,171 km located internationally. It also designs and builds principal transport infrastructure works, roads, motorways, railways, underground railways, bridges, viaducts, and tunnels; and civil and industrial construction works, such as hospitals, shopping centers, and airports, as well as electrical and electromechanical systems. In addition, the company designs, builds, and manages infrastructure network monitoring systems, info mobility products, toll collection products, etc.; develops technological software, primarily application software that manages road databases; and engages in the engineering and integration of technologies and instruments to carry out tools for photographic, geometric, and topographic surveys of infrastructures. Further, it develops and implements technologies in the service of safety and assisted driving of vehicles; and operates in the lease sector of both fiber optics and sites for the positioning of transmission devices for companies operating in the mobile telephony sector. Additionally, ASTM S.p.A. is involved in the design, construction, and management of systems for safety, mobility information, toll collection, and telecommunications. The company was formerly known as Autostrada Torino Milano S.p.A. and changed its name to ASTM S.p.A. in January 2013. ASTM S.p.A. was founded in 1928 and is based in Turin, Italy.
